zh.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓
zh.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: 美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Oakley於1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓時，她的父親Miles Oakley23歲，母親Mary Browne28歲。她於1653年2月14日與Edmund Browne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1672年在她的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓
zh-hans.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: 美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Oakley于1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓时，她的父亲Miles Oakley23岁，母亲Mary Browne28岁。她于1653年2月14日与Edmund Browne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1672年在她的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Oakley was born in 1635, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Miles Oakley, was 23 and her mother, Mary Browne, was 28. She married Edmund Browne on 14 February 1653, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1672, in her hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Oakley est née en 1635, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Miles Oakley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary Browne, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Browne le 14 février 1653, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1672, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

Sie hat am 14. Februar 1653 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Edmund Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1672 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Edmund Browne il 14 febbraio 1653, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストン
ja.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンドールチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Oakleyが1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで生まれた時，父Miles Oakleyは23歳，母Mary Browneは28歳であった。1653年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでEdmund Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1672年に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 도르체스터
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Oakley(이)가 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Miles Oakley(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Browne(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1653년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Edmund Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1672년 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Edmund Browne em 14 de fevereiro de 1653, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.Dorchester, Boston, Suffolk, Massachuset: дорчестир, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Oakley родилась в 1635 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Miles Oakley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Browne, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Browne 14 февраля 1653 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1672 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.
